RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0004 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Grace Smith Date of Birth: 23/08/1985 SSN (tokenized): TKN-141286 Annual Income: $42,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $49,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN93433AL Nissan Model 3 2025 Hybrid CPO 27,000 VIN60518AL Honda 320i 2016 Hybrid New 29,000 Authorized Signature: Grace Smith
